chains.description: Classic SQL/NoSQL/command injection leading directly to sensitive data exfiltration.

target_risk.summary:
MISTCODER Risk Assessment — Level: HIGH  (8.9/10)

  9 findings detected, 9 reachable from attack surface.
  2 findings amplified by multi-step exploitation chains.
  Highest priority: Sensitive Data Exfiltration at None:None (score 6.5).

  Recommendation: Address all CRITICAL and HIGH findings before deployment.
  Focus remediation on the top-5 attack surface nodes identified above.
